title: Published in the Bakersfield Californian on December 12, 2019. Link to article here: https://www.bakersfield.com/ opinion/community-voices-open- trade-with-our-neighbors-is-a- win/

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California farmers are the largest producers of food in the United States.",
    "California leads the nation in the production of more than 45 agriculture products, including strawberries, raisins, walnuts, pomegranates, olives, nectarines, and lemons.",
    "In 2018, California exported $48.4 billion in goods and services to Canada and Mexico combined.",
    "Trade with Canada and Mexico supports nearly 240,000 jobs in California.",
    "The United States-Mexico-Canada Agreement (USMCA) would give California dairy farmers access to Canadian and Mexican markets.",
    "The USMCA would eliminate trade barriers and expand market access for agricultural products.",
    "The USMCA would modernize digital trade and offer transparency for many industries.",
    "Advancements in the field of technology since 1993 have contributed to precision farming.",
    "Millions of farmers in California benefit from technology that helps them grow food more sustainably and efficiently.",
    "The USMCA aims to spur more innovation and enhance information exchange regarding technology."
  ]
}
```
